node.title: Uber | OA 2022 | Convert base 2 into base 6

topic.title: Uber | OA 2022 | Convert base 2 into base 6

post.content: For e.g.  1100 in base 2 is 12 in base 10, and 20 in base 6
return Integer.toString( Integer.parseInt(number, sourceBase), destinationBase);\n//number is in String, return value is in string\n//number = "1100" sourceBase=2, destinationBase=6
